title: U.S. says more than 8 million barrels of oil transited Hormuz Sunday with military assistance
summary_full: Ship traffic has fallen as the security situation in Hormuz rapidly deteriorated. Iran has repeatedly attacked ships, triggering fresh fighting with the U.S.
summary_public: Ship traffic has fallen as the security situation in Hormuz rapidly deteriorated. Iran has repeatedly attacked ships, triggering fresh fighting with the U.S.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran has repeatedly attacked ships, triggering fresh fighting with the U.S.
